title: oldenlandia hookeri
intro: Oldenlandia hookeri, also known as Hooker's oldenlandia or Si-Hai-Long, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Oldenlandia hookeri have been utilized for centuries, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, to treat various health conditions. It is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as provide cardiovascular benefits. Oldenlandia hookeri is typically prepared as a herbal tea or decoction, and it can also be combined with other herbs to create a formula for specific health conditions.
